company_context: Looker business intelligence platform embedded analytics | Google Cloud Gartner recognizes Google as a Leader in the 2025 Magic Quadrant™ for Analytics and Business Intelligence Platforms. Looker Analyze governed data, deliver business insights, and build AI-powered applications Build the foundation for responsible data insights with Looker. Leveraging Google’s deep roots and track record of AI-led innovation, Looker delivers the most intelligent BI solution by combining foundational AI, cloud-first infrastructure, industry leading APIs, and our flexible semantic layer. Try it free Request demo Product highlights: API-first platform with composable BI Business-friendly AI powered analytics with governed, modeled data Open and trusted semantic model Google-easy dashboarding Unleash Data's Full Potential: The Looker Story 1:43 video Features Transform your data landscape into a unified, trusted source for AI and human analysis alike with Looker’s universal semantic modeling layer Looker’s trusted modeling layer provides a single place to curate and govern the metrics most important to your business. This means that users will see consistent results regardless of where they are consumed. In order for you to use this consistent trustworthy information in your tools of choice, we have opened up the Looker modeling layer to our ecosystem and are actively engaged with our partners to ensure the information in your Looker platform doesn’t stay there. The Foundation of Trustworthy AI 4:02 Conversational Analytics to talk with and trust your data Conversational Analytics is a chat-with-your-data feature that is powered by Gemini for Google Cloud. Conversational Analytics empowers users to go beyond static dashboards and ask data-related questions in regular, natural language, even with little or no expertise in business intelligence. You can also leverage Google’s latest Gemini models with your own custom applications through the Conversational Analytics API . Looker Conversational Analytics 5:16 Build custom data experiences and data apps with Looker’s powerful embedded capabilities Embedded analytics goes beyond placing dashboards in apps. It's about transforming data into deeply integrated, value-driving experiences. With Looker, fully interactive dashboards can be seamlessly integrated into your applications. The robust API coverage allows you to do just about anything from the UI through API. This unlocks limitless possibilities to create data experiences beyond a Looker dashboard. In addition, Looker extensions integrate directly with Vertex AI , enabling powerful custom AI workflows and advanced analytics within your Looker instance. Looker's Embedded Analytics 2:28 Simplify and secure your analytics with Looker on Google Cloud Looker on Google Cloud takes the existing powerful capabilities from the Looker platform and seamlessly integrates it into the secure Google Cloud ecosystem. Features our customers have come to love and expect in all Google C

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm a Sales Development Representative with DeepData AI. I came across your company and was impressed with the work you're doing with Looker business intelligence platform. I'd love to introduce you to our data processing solution that can help you unlock even more insights from your data.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Hi Alex, I'm John, the CTO. We're actually pretty happy with our current data analytics setup, and I'm not sure we're in the market for a new solution right now. What makes you think DeepData AI is a good fit for us?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, John, our solution is designed to handle large volumes of data and provide faster processing times, which can help you make more informed decisions. We've had success with similar companies in the past, and I think we could help you optimize your data workflow. Would you be open to a quick demo to see how it works?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm not sure that's necessary, Alex. We've already invested heavily in Looker and Google Cloud, and I'm not convinced that adding another tool to the mix is the best use of our resources. Plus, I'm concerned about the integration costs and potential disruptions to our current workflow. Can you speak to how your solution would integrate with our existing infrastructure?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely, John. Our solution is designed to be flexible and can integrate with a variety of data sources and platforms, including Looker and Google Cloud. We've had success with similar integrations in the past, and our team would work closely with yours to ensure a seamless onboarding process. As for the cost, I'd be happy to provide a customized quote based on your specific needs.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, Alex, but to be honest, we're in the middle of a major project right now and don't have the bandwidth to take on a new implementation. Even if we were interested, I'm not sure we could justify the cost at this time. We're trying to prioritize our spending and focus on the most critical initiatives.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand, John. Perhaps we could schedule a follow-up conversation in a few months to revisit the opportunity? I'd be happy to provide some case studies and testimonials from similar companies in the meantime to help build a stronger business case for our solution.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Alex, I appreciate your persistence, but I think we're going to have to pass on DeepData AI for now. We've got too much on our plate and can't take on any new initiatives at this time. I appreciate the introduction, but I don't think we'll be moving forward with your solution.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's concerns about integration and cost to potentially overcome the timing objection and keep the conversation alive. Sentiment: Neutral
